title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
